h3a451715g7265g4c42ga782g922a42d42a6b: Let's be civilised about this, eh? I have something you want.
hc4cbdba3gd340g4375g86a2g047a1b965fb5: What I want is Mayrina - alive and free.
h4b7a069dg30c1g46bdg879bgc505a4c0a3af: Shut it. You owe me a babe, girl. And I'll take it - whether you like it or not.
h797e8a7egc693g4af9gbc36g00f58227337a: Let me leave with the girl, and I'll give you power.
he3613a4egb36fg4e21g9b64gf28eb5ea79fd: You want to be stronger? Tougher? Smarter? Done! Anything is possible. (Ability Score)
hab9623c2gaf4cg4e89gbf6cg0543b5f17c6a: Just let me keep the girl and her babe.
hedafcd0fg25ffg4030g9d6egabfa24471117: A simple trade? More deception. Take her head.
h99e97ad4g9728g40e5g88a5g4685cd4dcf9a: If you want to live, hand over Mayrina and this power. Right now.
h8c48922bg40d5g472agb2c9gdc56bfca2211: I'll not soon forget this, sweetness. You have my word.
h77a6b9f9g4366g43ddgbfd7g78ea820fd710: No good can come of this. Let Mayrina go.
he3932962g0819g4b3dga588g74073f8b6b70: Gods turn your goody soul to shite.
h50d14d3dga21dg4b50gb081g6a2a557d1194: Not that it matters - I'll find another just as plump an' ripe.
hdb56e1d7g1594g48a9g8602g0d3c0e9b0011: But the deal... What about my husband? What happens to him?
h735f71e5g3ae8g414cgb9feg828716a677a2: Deal's off you dumb cow! And you've him to thank for it.
h3eab4b47g6304g4f85gbc4dgc0a02312b563: Deal's off you dumb cow! And you've her to thank for it.
h45f5c4e1g6a74g4980g9f41gb2ea3e44408b: Keep the girl. I'll take the power.
he3ad1786g42c7g4228gb073gb46de7efe955: Deal's on, girl. And you're not leaving my side till you deliver.
h47dfef57g4a8ag4a5fgb2c4ga3518e69e3d2: Bollocks to luck. It's only the deal that counts.
hd3af59f2g1130g446cg9a28gdf0d959027c5: Get out of here before I change my mind.
h0d97a0e9g0649g47c7gb917g18ab540e2238: Aw. Don't act like you won't miss me.
ha4c47348ge7b4g4b3fgba69gc6ac583b9988: If I ever see you again, you'll be fertilising this swamp.
h6b2b2fc9g2f3ag4c57gb8a7g3ea17adfa681: If I ever see you again, you'll have a tentacle for a tongue.
hd0969bd4gb51eg4fdcgab80gd64fb1cc0e71: I can set up shop elsewhere. People always need 'lotions and potions.'
h1c7d7405gb37ag4cddg8439g7e85a6316e46: I think a dead hag is the answer here.
hdbcc6e21gb709g4b39g964fgfd6f78b44288: Fine. Have it your way! I'll rip our your throat yet, you little bollocks.
hc2756f40g06cag41b9gb60fg8b8ff1c85044: My reinforcements are nearly here. Give me the girl and the power and they'll spare you.
h40d6157fgcb90g4a20gae49g1a6d4a0212b8: I'll take the girl and the power, or your life.
h4e5fde44g3947g4843g8fcdgd43d21f199a1: I could crush you in an instant. Give me the power and the girl, and you'll live.
h1cd83fa7g0238g443fg8520g886d998a4510: I know a beaten opponent when I see one. Give me the power and the girl, and I'll let you live.
hf2189652g82acg47dcg8444g36969431ecce: Such power will let me better serve the Spider Queen. Give it to me.
h50161c6eg8ee4g4322ga4ddg840242ec9143: The human means nothing to me. Give me the power.
hcec440e6g19bfg4f78g8866gb9ddbc722176: In the name of Eilistraee, release the girl and leave this place - never to return.
hf063e59cg1f57g4cbcg92d9gafdf5e7f4b6a: Argh, nothing irks me more than a goody-two shoes drow. Fine.
hda4b4c6agf268g4186gb84dg2fae790ea5c8: Neither. But a hag's head would make an excellent trophy.
hdf0ece98gae78g4646gb56eg33c0aeb05599: Tch. Tough talk from the oversized lemon. But fine. Have it your way. I'll rip out your throat!
h9c0308afg59e0g430fgbc3ag9b7038a78867: You're a vile, monstrous creature. There is no bargain for you but death.
h171207f6g2a68g49eagbc6bg1de5d9c97642: Tch. Doesn't it ever get lonely? Up on that high horse of yours?
h7c84dc63g8b1dg4f13ga50egf832af0270ad: But have it your way. Tell your precious little god I say hello... after I rip out your throat!
h25c98c98g9c0ag4ee6g8286g0cac800f35c6: There's no choice to make. A corrupting force like you has to be destroyed.
hf126545bga8d9g4255g92e6ga1d26ffa4449: I'll bathe in your blood as I offer your death up in prayer.
hcac8eb8cg5143g41f4ga967g3d04002e056f: You're a stain upon this land, but I will cleanse it.
h99e0e736g0e40g4917g9323ge000531bea4f: Tch. I hear blood and guts make excellent fertiliser. Let's spread you over the soil and see, you little bollocks.
h46e9e289ga007g4659g9811gad7876274295: You have nothing that could tempt me.
h24c8d166g4641g4415gaf9dgd81956902983: Tch. Fine. Have it your way. I'll use that thick skull of yours as a stewing pot!
h35da4804g477dg4332gb66dgd0e437e867e2: Hags are the scourge of the natural world. I cannot let you live.
hb1420e40gb8fbg4287ga4fag5eaea4aab3ac: I've never been called a scourge before, you flirt. But sweet words won't get you out of this one!
hb3c5fe04gbdc5g4785ga505g65e1b9bc13dd: If her powers were worth anything, we wouldn't have beaten her. Finish this.
h00fff5a6gffdfg489ega3e5gae5f2cf2beff: Trading some whelp we just met for impossible power? It's a fine deal.
hb25893c7g5465g4905gb12dge62d8a417339: Don't you dare take the offer. No power is worth such a cruel price.
hda72f6f0g057ag4301gb49ag72ab75ab8507: Not only would this be a vile deal, it would be folly to trust a hag's gifts.
h5d2433e1g255bg47dbg8b33g9e196f67afba: Wait - Ethel can still help me!
h4676e328g9ddbg4918gb237gb8bc45dc0de1: You bet that belly of yours I can. The deal is on.
h00a0d593g679ag4219gaa19g9941591e68fc: I knew I liked you, dearie.
h8d5e34d3g579fg4e8agb13egacfb4b57ef8c: I can give you power. Anything you want!
haeb7a4d7ge005g46efgb7d1g3523376e835e: You want to be stronger? Tougher? Smarter? Done! Just let me go. (+ Ability Point)
h8d1e1fb3g0b27g49a5gac0dg5ccff4a67dd7: Keep your life and your magic. I don't want either.
h589bb315g30c6g46cdga919g1efabf907ba9: Why, sweetness. You're either a saint or an eejit.
h5bc07adcg6487g4118gbd55gda9e4d8ca4bd: Give me power - the more the better.
h82b076b6gbf71g44b0gbffcgad3eec9e013e: We've suffered her trickery long enough - end this.
h8367ba99g1178g4ef4g9633g75a289a49f46: |Nothing is worth bargaining with this witch.|
hd203bedegf823g4f54gb84cg34a507fb601b: I'm all for killing her, but let's get that power first, hmm?
h77533492gba21g41bbgacf5ge88b0baa1189: Kill the hag. End of story.
h5b6604fcg9254g468cga26fg95f66d79010f: End her now, or she'll be cursing new victims by sundown.
h42a7f1f2g40f5g45b2gaf58g7309a2aaa7a5: To trust a hag, even when she's at your mercy, would be beyond folly. I say we end this.
haba8108fg344fg4529g84a6gf4d4ef7fe43e: Indeed. I'll take your head and stick it on a pike.
h34329881g7b61g4967g9bf6g925af5a5786b: Now, petal, there's... there's no need for such talk.
hfe077c74gad31g4e03gb0c9g302f0070b0da: If you're gloating now, just wait till you hear my offer, petal.
h06b5eb34gae7eg4a45g9c66g6d9e6f38bde3: Careful. I doubt we have the same concept of 'civilised'.
he77664a7g81f3g4fa6g8c69ga2fa5647a169: Hold your horses - just hear me out.
hee4ca2fagfb26g4f2fgb587g387490d53023: A servant of Vlaakith wants for nothing that her queen can't give.
h01b28673g8db5g42fbgb3d6ge18b5cc402db: I'm an expert on deals. No funny business.
h713cd12dgf844g4c72ga4f7g082059505f68: You wound me, sweetie. My offer will put that little pact of yours to shame.
